name: Artichoke Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Break artichokes into small pieces.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients and toss well.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Transfer mixture to a baking dish (9 x 9 or 7 x 11 inches).
5. Sprinkle additional cheese on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
